transcript.text:
[Today is the last day in Ulleung Island] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Last night in Ulleung Island] I'm leaving tomorrow
Be healthy and prosper
[I'll be rooting for you]
I'm going to miss you
Well, hearing the voices will be good enough
I was surprised to see you eat so much
And Ulleungdo has gotten a lot of publicity all thanks to you
Because you came here to do mukbang
Take all the good energy from Ulleungdo and reach 10 million subscribers
I will be praying for you
I will get all the Ulleungdo villagers to make it happen
[I want to thank you for letting me stay and make great memories here]
I will miss you Gom-soon
[Not "hand"! I'm just holding onto you]
[Thank you for everything Gom-soon!]

[The next morning]
I'm going back home now because I'm finished with everything
[No, don't go!]
This isn't much, but
Since it's getting cold now
[A scarf as a present for her]
I'm supposed to be giving you a farewell gift though
[No! I should be giving you!]
-I'll come back again -Okay, stay healthy
[Please be healthy until we meet again!]
Why're you wearing that?
[Slides that she wore every day here lol]
What is this?
It's for you to drink
Put some tape around here so it doesn't spill It's a souvenir
Thank you so much

I'll come again
Tape it!
Hello ma'am
My son called me just to ask me
if I took photos or gotten your autograph
-I had no idea -Let's take 1!
[She's just so adorable]
[Photo]
[And autograph]
I'm leaving today
I thought you're here for 100 days
It's 1 month
-I'll be back again -You better
I'll make you even more delicious food next time
[They're all giving her stuff]
I want to give her some more stuff

[Let's just run]
I came here to eat because of you
Really?
Our puppy is famous now
They look for her now
[Ulleungdo's superstar]
Keep good health
Goodbye
You're just so lovable
-Bye -Thank you, I'll make sure to come back later
It's such a bummer that it's my last day here at Ulleungdo
We'll be taking this cruise ship
I'm going to be eating in there
[Today is a Cruise Mukbang]
[Pohang->Ulleungdo (around 6 hours)]
[We're inside]

[Let's explore]
It's a cafe
[Looking around the convenience store]
[Found a pumpkin pastry]
They are in line to get the pumpkin bread
I'm going to eat outside
[Let's check out the view]
Amazing The weather is so nice
[How is the sweet pumpkin bread?]
It's almost like chestnut flavor delimanjoo (pastry snack) But a little different
Tasty
[There's more to this ship!]
[Massage room]
[Pet zone]
[Karaoke] Not open though because of covid
[How about the VVIP room?]

[Well?]
It's a hotel in here
[A lovely oceanview as well]
[Bed and a TV]
[And here's the standard room]
This is heaven compared to where we were at last time!
The view here is nice too
Your own restroom?
This is a hotel too
They prepared a special meal on the cruise so I'm going to go eat now
[It's steak today]
[It's not on the menu, but just for today!]
[Scallop Shrimp Salad]
[What? That's an eel!]
[Eel Salad]
[Hello Abalone]

[Grilled Abalone]
[Thank you for preparing this special meal for me!]
Thank you
[Seratonin level at its high]
[Everything is ready now]
Over here we have tomahawk, t-bone, and sirloin
That could feed all of us here
[Not sure about that]
There will be leftovers if the 4 of us ate that
I usually eat tomahawk steak from the bone
But let's keep it classy for now
Ribeye cap!
This is the best part of the tomahawk
That cuts so easily
Eating steak as we leave Ulleungdo
You can see Ulleungdo very clearly from here

So beautiful
[Bye Ulleungdo]
[First bite!]
That tastes so much better than I thought
It's so tender
[The captain is here to see Tzuyang]
[Eating all of that by yourself?...]
[Fighting!] (You can do it)
Thank you
What is this?
Is it scallop?
It looks like it
Looks delicious
It is!
They don't have steak on the menu here on this cruise
There's a buffet-style restaurant instead

But the cruise team prepared this special meal just for me
Thank you
Let's get some sauce on here
Get some sauce on it
It feels different eating on board
I don't usually keep it classy, but I just have to for today's mukbang
[Score the abalone]
As a whole
The atmosphere here is amazing
The pretty clouds are coming out
We're going away from the gloomy clouds
Go away!
What's this?
Is it sirloin?
It's as thick as beef
["I'll keep it classy today"]

[She finds it funny too]
I tried not to eat with my hands here
Let's just eat
I was told you like this drink
I didn't know how many to buy, so I bought 6
-Thank you -Enjoy
[Ulleungdo cruise is just the best!]
Plum juice over wine on the cruise!
[Fueling]
I can't keep it formal
Let's just grub
This has eel!
[Scraping out the vegetables]
Freshwater eel
[An authentic reaction]
I've never realized Ulleungdo was this big

It's actually really big
Even if I'm this far away
It's still big
Shrimp
On top
[She looks very satisfied]
[They look very fascinated]
[She has given up using the knife]
It rips off so easily maybe because of the thinness
What was that sound?
I'm going to eat quickly and go inside because it's so cold
But the water is so pretty
The sun is starting to come this way
[So cold]
[Shivering Mukbang]
It's really good

Tzuyang,
I think it's better for you to continue eating inside our VIP room because of the wind
Really?
Thank you I was freezing
It's so warm
I thought I was going to freeze to death
The VIP room makes it feel like I'm in a hotel
How's this in a ship?
Amazing
[Let's continue eating]
Has there been a cruise mukbang before?
T-bone's sirloin
T-bone tastes the best here
Shrimp on top
It's a golden kiwi!
I'm going to save that for later as a dessert It's so good

[Today's sponsor]
I can do it now without him
Wait, what is this?!
A brass glass that keeps the drink cool?!
[Fail]
It's not as good without him
[Brass beer glass]
[The glass gets cold as soon as the drink is poured]
[Let's down some real quick]
[Satisfied]
You can drink alcoholic beverages on the cruise unlike boats
There's a small store here
So it's perfect to grab a couple of drinks
Another thing I like about being on a cruise
Is that you can take your own vehicle here
Also, the ride feels safer even if it takes longer

Taking a cruise is perfect for people that get seasick easily
[Clearing up the food]
There's no more scallop left
There's 1!
Found 1
Last shrimp
[Abandoned vegetables]
Last piece of eel!
Last piece of tomahawk!
Last piece of abalone
[And a drink from the brass glass]
[Last piece of sirloin]
[All finished!]
[Ulleungdo, an island I've been dearly attached to for a month]
[With neighbors that treated me with such affection]
[Met Gom-soon for the first time]

[A cow is better to raise than Tzuyang]
[The person that gave the biggest aid here in Ulleungdo]
[Had fun octopus fishing]
[Got a haircut]
[Gotten fairly close with Gom-soon]
[October 15th, Dokdo Day]
[Ulleungdo's first guest]
[Checked 1 off the bucketlist]
[Had a competition with Hansarang Mountain Club comedians]
[Ulleungdo is just filled with nothing but fond memories]
Until next time Ulleungdo! [A special thank you to all the Ulleungdo villagers that cooperated with filming this series] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Hansaram Regional Children's Welfare Center'] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
